name: Bellini
description: A light sparkling aperitif that pairs juicy white peach with dry prosecco for a soft, fruity finish.
method: Pour peach puree into the mixing glass with ice, add the Prosecco wine. Stir gently and pour in a chilled flute glass.  Note: PUCCINI - Fresh Mandarin Orange Juice; ROSSINI - Fresh Strawberry Puree; TINTORETTO - Fresh Pomegranate Juice.

name: Black Russian
description: A simple spirit-forward sipper that combines vodka and coffee liqueur for a dark, lightly sweet profile.
method: Pour the ingredients into the old fashioned glass filled with ice cubes. Stir gently.  Note: WHITE RUSSIAN - Float fresh cream on the top and stir in slowly.

name: Bloody Mary
description: A savory vodka highball built on tomato juice, citrus, and spice with a bracing brunch-style character.
method: Stir gently all the ingredients in a mixing glass with ice, pour into rocks glass. Note: If requested served with ice, pour into highball glass.
garnish: Celery, Lemon Wedge (Optional)

name: Caipirinha
description: A bold Brazilian sour that muddles fresh lime with sugar and cachaça for a bright, rustic cane-spirit kick.
method: Place lime and sugar into a double old fashioned glass and muddle gently. Fill the glass with cracked ice and add Cachaça. Stir gently to involve ingredients. Note: CAIPIROSKA - Instead of Cachaça use Vodka;

name: Champagne Cocktail
description: A crisp celebratory serve that lifts cognac, bitters, and sugar with dry sparkling wine.
method: Place the sugar cube with 2 dashes of bitters in a large Champagne glass, add the cognac. Pour gently chilled Champagne.
garnish: Garnish with orange zest and maraschino cherry.

name: Corpse Reviver #2
description: A sharp, aromatic classic that balances gin, citrus, orange liqueur, Lillet, and absinthe into a brisk refresher.
method: Pour all ingredients into shaker with ice. Shake well and strain in chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Garnish with orange zest

name: Cosmopolitan
description: A bright pink vodka sour with cranberry, orange liqueur, and lime that drinks crisp, tart, and polished.
method: Add all ingredients into a cocktail shaker filled with ice. Shake well and strain into a large cocktail glass.
garnish: Garnish with a lemon twist.

name: Cuba Libre
description: A refreshing rum and cola long drink sharpened with lime for an easy highball profile.
method: Build all ingredients in a highball glass filled with ice.
garnish: Garnish with lime wedge.

name: French 75
description: A sparkling gin sour that blends citrus and sugar with Champagne for a lively, elegant finish.
method: Pour all the ingredients, except Champagne, into a shaker. Shake well and strain into a Champagne flute. Top up with Champagne. Stir gently.

name: French Connection
description: A smooth after-dinner mix of cognac and amaretto with a warm, nutty sweetness.
method: Pour all ingredients directly into an old fashioned glass filled with ice cubes. Stir gently.

name: Golden Dream
description: A creamy dessert-style cocktail with orange, herbal liqueur, and cream softened by citrus.
method: Pour all ingredients into shaker filled with ice. Shake briskly for few seconds. Strain into chilled cocktail glass.

name: Grasshopper
description: A sweet mint-and-cocoa cream cocktail with a smooth, confectionary dessert profile.
method: Pour all ingredients into shaker filled with ice. Shake briskly for few seconds. Strain into chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: N/A, optional mint leaf

name: Hemingway Special
description: A dry, fruity daiquiri variation combining rum, grapefruit, maraschino, and lime.
method: Pour all ingredients into a shaker with ice. Shake well and strain into a large cocktail glass.

name: Horse's Neck
description: A long, easy brandy and ginger ale highball brightened by bitters and a long lemon twist.
method: Pour Cognac and ginger ale directly into a highball glass with ice cubes. Stir gently. If preferred, add dashes of Angostura Bitter.
garnish: Garnish with a rind of one lemon spiral.

name: Irish Coffee
description: A warming coffee drink that layers Irish whiskey, sugar, and lightly whipped cream.
method: Warm black coffee is poured into a pre-heated Irish coffee glass. Whiskey and at least one teaspoon of sugar is added and stirred until dissolved. Fresh thick chilled cream is carefully poured over the back of a spoon held just above the surface of the coffee. The layer of cream will float on the coffee without mixing. Plain sugar can be replaced with sugar syrup

name: KIR
description: A delicate wine aperitif that combines dry white wine with creme de cassis for gentle berry fruit.
method: Pour Crème de Cassis into glass, top up with white wine. Note: KIR ROYAL - Use Champagne instead of white wine

name: Long Island Ice Tea
description: A potent citrusy long drink that mixes several base spirits with orange liqueur, lemon, and cola.
method: Add all ingredients into a highball glass filled with ice. Stir gently.
garnish: Lemon Slice (Optional)

name: Mai-Tai
description: A rich tropical rum sour with orange curacao, orgeat, and lime balancing nutty sweetness against citrus.
method: Add all ingredients into a shaker with ice. Shake and pour into a double rocks glass or a highball glass.  The Martinique molasses rum used by Trader Vic was not an Agricole rum but a type of “rummy” from molasses.
garnish: Garnish with pineapple spear, mint leaves, and lime peel.

name: Margarita
description: A crisp tequila sour built on orange liqueur and lime with a bright, salty edge.
method: Add all ingredients into a shaker with ice. Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass
garnish: Half salt rim (Optional)

name: Mimosa
description: A light brunch sparkle that combines chilled orange juice and sparkling wine.
method: Pour orange juice into a flute glass and gently pour the sparkling wine. Stir gently. Note: Also known as Buck's Fizz.
garnish: Garnish with an orange twist (optional).

name: Mint Julep
description: A cooling bourbon serve with mint and sugar, traditionally crushed-ice cold and richly aromatic.
method: In Julep Stainless Steel Cup gently muddle the mint with sugar and water. Fill the glass with cracked ice, add the Bourbon and stir well until the cup frosts.
garnish: Garnish with a mint sprig.

name: Mojito
description: A refreshing rum highball with mint, lime, sugar, and soda water for a bright, lively profile.
method: Mix mint springs with sugar and lime juice. Add splash of soda water and fill the glass with ice. Pour the rum and top with soda water. Light stir to involve all ingredients.
garnish: Garnish with sprigs of mint and slice of lime.

name: Moscow Mule
description: A spicy-fresh vodka highball with ginger beer and lime served long and cooling.
method: In a Mule Cup or rocks glass, combine the vodka and ginger beer. Add lime juice and gently stir to involve all ingredients.
garnish: Garnish with a lime slice

name: Pina Colada
description: A creamy tropical blend of rum, pineapple, and coconut with a lush vacation-style profile.
method: Blend all the ingredients with ice in an electric blender, pour into a large glass, and serve with straws.  Note: Historically a few drops of fresh lime juice were added to taste. 4 slices of fresh pineapple can be used instead of juice
garnish: Garnish with a slice of pineapple with a cocktail cherry.

name: Pisco Sour
description: A silky pisco sour topped with bitters and balanced by lime, sugar, and egg white texture.
method: Add all ingredients into a shaker with ice. Shake and strain into a chilled goblet glass.
garnish: Few dashes of Amargo bitters on top as an aromatic garnish.

name: Sea Breeze
description: A light tart highball combining vodka with cranberry and grapefruit juice.
method: Build all ingredients in a highball glass filled with ice.
garnish: Garnish with orange zest and cherry

name: Sex on the Beach
description: A fruity, easy-drinking long cocktail with vodka, peach, cranberry, and orange notes.
method: Build all ingredients in a highball glass filled with ice.
garnish: Garnish with a half orange slice.

name: Singapore Sling
description: A complex tropical gin sling layered with cherry, herbal liqueurs, bitters, and fruit juices.
method: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker filled with ice cubes. Shake well. Strain into Hurricane glass.
garnish: Garnish with pineapple and maraschino cherry

name: Tequila Sunrise
description: A bright tequila long drink with orange juice and grenadine that fades from citrus to sweet fruit.
method: Pour tequila and orange juice directly into highball glass filled with ice cubes. Add the grenadine syrup to create chromatic effect (sunrise), do not stir.
garnish: Garnish with half orange slice or an orange zest

name: Vesper
description: A dry, strong martini-style cocktail with gin, vodka, and aromatized wine.
method: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker filled with ice cubes. Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Lemon zest

name: Zombie
description: A powerful layered tiki drink with multiple rums, citrus, spice, and tropical fruit depth.
method: Add all ingredients into an electric blender with 170 grams of cracked ice. With pulse bottom blend for a few seconds. Serve in a tall tumbler glass.  Note: Donn's Mix: 2 parts of fresh yellow grapefruit and 1 part of cinnamon syrup
garnish: Garnish with mint leaves.

name: Barracuda
description: A sparkling rum cocktail with pineapple, citrus, and Galliano for a tropical aperitif feel.
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker except the Prosecco, shake well with ice, strain into chilled highball glass filled with ice and top up with Prosecco.
garnish: Pineapple and Cherry, optional mint sprig for additional aroma.

name: Bee's Knees
description: A floral gin sour softened by honey syrup and brightened with lemon.
method: Stir honey with lemon and orange juices until it dissolves, add gin and shake with ice. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Optionally garnish with a lemon or orange zest.

name: Bramble
description: A fresh gin sour lengthened over crushed ice with blackberry liqueur for berry depth.
method: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker except the Crème de Mûre, shake well with ice, strain into chilled old fashioned glass filled with crushed ice, then pour the blackberry liqueur (Crème de Mûre) over the top of the drink, in a circular motion.
garnish: Garnish optionally with a lemon slice and blackberries.

name: Canchanchara
description: A rustic Cuban rum sour combining aguardiente-style rum, honey, and lime.
method: Mix honey with water and lime juice and spread the mixture on the bottom and sides of the glass. Add cracked ice, and then the rum. End by energetically stirring from bottom to top.
garnish: Lime wedge.

name: Dark ‘n' stormy
description: A dark rum and ginger beer highball with lime, delivering spicy refreshment and molasses depth.
method: In a highball glass filled with ice pour the ginger beer and top floating with the Rum.
garnish: Garnish with a lime wedge or slice.

name: Espresso Martini
description: A chilled vodka espresso cocktail with coffee richness, light sweetness, and a creamy foam.
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.

name: Fernandito
description: A simple Argentine highball mixing bitter amaro with cola for a bittersweet, easygoing drink.
method: Pour the Fernet Branca into a double old fashioned glass with ice, fill the glass up with Cola. Gently stir.

name: French Martini
description: A fruity vodka cocktail with raspberry liqueur and pineapple, shaken to a soft froth.
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Squeeze oil from lemon peel onto the drink.

name: Illegal
description: A smoky, herbal mezcal cocktail with rum, falernum, maraschino, and citrus complexity.
method: Pour all ingredients into the shaker. Shake vigorously with ice. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass, or “on the rocks” in a traditional clay or terracotta mug.

name: Lemon drop Martini
description: A sharp, sweet-tart vodka sour centered on bright lemon flavor.
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Garnish with sugar rim around the glass.

name: Naked and Famous
description: A modern equal-parts cocktail pairing mezcal, yellow chartreuse, Aperol, and lime in a smoky-bitter balance.
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.

name: New York Sour
description: A whiskey sour capped with red wine for layered citrus, oak, and berry richness.
method: Pour all ingredients into the shaker. Shake vigorously with ice. Strain into a chilled rocks glass filled with ice. Float the wine on top.
garnish: Garnish with lemon or orange zest with cherry.

name: Old Cuban
description: A minty sparkling rum cocktail that drinks like a mojito crossed with a Champagne sour.
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker except the wine, shake well with ice, strain into chilled elegant cocktail glass. Top up with the sparkling wine.
garnish: Garnish with mint springs.

name: Paloma
description: A refreshing tequila highball with grapefruit, citrus, and bubbles in a lightly bitter style.
method: Poor the tequila into a highball glass, squeeze the lime juice. Add ice and salt, fill up pink grapefruit soda. Stir gently.
garnish: Garnish with a slice of lime.

name: Paper Plane
description: A bright modern equal-parts cocktail balancing bourbon, Aperol, amaro, and lemon.
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.

name: Penicillin
description: A smoky blended scotch sour with honey, ginger, and lemon, finished with an Islay float.
method: Muddle fresh ginger in a shaker and add the remaining ingredients, except for the Islay single malt whiskey. Fill the shaker with ice and shake. Double-strain into a chilled old fashioned glass with ice. Float the single malt whisky on top.
garnish: Garnish with candied ginger.

name: Russian Spring Punch
description: A sparkling vodka cocktail that combines creme de cassis, lemon, and wine in a festive punch style.
method: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker except the sparkling wine, shake well with ice, strain into a chilled tall tumbler glass filled with ice, and top up with sparkling wine.
garnish: Garnish with blackberries and optionally a lemon slice as well.

name: Southside
description: A minty gin sour with crisp citrus and a cooling herbal finish.
method: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, double-strain into chilled cocktail glass. Note: If egg white is used shake vigorously.
garnish: Garnish with mint springs.

name: Spicy Fifty
description: A lively vodka cocktail with elderflower, lime, and chili heat over a fresh fruit profile.
method: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, double-strain into chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Garnish with a red chili pepper

name: Spritz
description: A low-strength sparkling aperitif with bittersweet orange notes and an easy afternoon style.
method: Build all ingredients into a wine glass filled with ice. Stir gently. NOTE: There are other versions of the Spritz that use Campari, Cynar or Select instead of Aperol.
garnish: Garnish with a slice of orange.

name: Suffering Bastard
description: A tall, brisk cocktail mixing cognac, gin, ginger beer, and citrus with a spicy backbone.
method: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker except the ginger beer, shake well with ice, Pour unstrained into a Collins glass or in the original S. Bastard mug and top up with ginger beer.
garnish: Garnish with mint springs and optionally an orange slice as well.

name: Tipperary
description: A whiskey cocktail with sweet vermouth and herbal liqueur, smooth yet savory and complex.
method: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well. Strain into chilled martini cocktail glass.
garnish: Garnish with a slice of orange.

name: Tommy's Margarita
description: A streamlined margarita variation that swaps orange liqueur for agave syrup, keeping tequila and lime at the center.
method: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into a chilled rocks glass filled with ice.
garnish: Garnish with a lime slice.

ingredients.direction: 30 ml Agave Syrup (1/2 Water + 1/2 Agave Nectar)

name: Trinidad Sour
description: A striking modern sour that uses Angostura bitters as a base with whiskey, orgeat, and lemon.
method: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: VE.N.TO
description: An Italian grappa sour with honey, chamomile, lemon, and wine foam, aromatic and softly floral.
method: Pour all ingredients into the shaker. Shake vigorously with ice. Strain into a chilled small tumbler glass filled with ice. Notes: If desired water can be replaced by chamomile infusion in the honey mix.
garnish: Garnish with lemon zest and white grapes.

ingredients.direction: 15 ml Honey mix (replace water with chamomile)

name: Yellow Bird
description: A bright rum cocktail combining citrus, orange liqueur, and herbal sweetness in a tropical frame.
method: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.

name: Alexander
description: A rich brandy-and-cacao cream cocktail with a smooth dessert character.
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker filled with ice cubes. Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Sprinkle fresh ground nutmeg on top.

name: Americano
description: A low-strength bitter aperitif of Campari and sweet vermouth lengthened with soda.
method: Mix the ingredients directly in an old fashioned glass filled with ice cubes. Add a splash of Soda Water. Stir gently.
garnish: Garnish with half orange slice and a lemon zest.

name: Angel Face
description: A fruity, fragrant trio of gin, apple brandy, and apricot liqueur.
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker filled with ice cubes. Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Aviation
description: A floral gin sour with maraschino and violet notes over bright lemon.
method: Add all ingredients into a cocktail shaker. Shake with cracked ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Optional Maraschino Cherry.

name: Between the Sheets
description: A spirited sidecar relative that blends rum, cognac, orange liqueur, and lemon.
method: Add all ingredients into a cocktail shaker. Shake with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Boulevardier
description: A whiskey variation on the Negroni with rich bittersweet depth and a warmer body.
method: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Garnish with orange zest, optionally a lemon zest.

name: Brandy Crusta
description: An ornate brandy sour with maraschino, curacao, lemon, and a sugared rim.
method: Mix together all ingredients with ice cubes in a mixing glass and strain into prepared slim cocktail glass.
garnish: Rub a slice of orange (or lemon) around the rim of the glass and dip it in pulverized white sugar, so that the sugar will adhere to the edge of the glass. Carefully curling place the orange/lemon peel around the inside of the glass.

name: Casino
description: A citrusy old-school gin cocktail with maraschino and orange bitters.
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktails shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled rocks glass with ice.
garnish: Garnish with lemon zest and a maraschino cherry.

name: Clover Club
description: A silky gin sour with raspberry sweetness, lemon brightness, and egg white texture.
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktails shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Fresh raspberries.

name: Daiquiri
description: A classic rum sour balancing white rum, lime, and sugar with clean, brisk structure.
method: In a cocktail shaker add all ingredients. Stir well to dissolve the sugar. Add ice and shake. Strain into chilled cocktail glass.

name: Dry Martini
description: A dry aromatic cocktail built around gin and vermouth with a clean, savory profile.
method: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well. Strain into chilled martini cocktail glass.
garnish: Squeeze oil from lemon peel onto the drink, or garnish with green olives if requested.

name: Gin Fizz
description: A lively gin sour topped with soda for a bright, frothy, refreshing serve.
method: Shake all ingredients with ice except soda water. Pour into thin tall Tumbler glass , top with a splash soda water.  NOTE: Serve without ice.
garnish: Garnish with a lemon slice, optional lemon zest.

name: Hanky Panky
description: A stirred gin and sweet vermouth cocktail accented by Fernet for a dry herbal finish.
method: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well. Strain into chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Orange zest.

name: John Collins
description: A tall sparkling gin sour with lemon, sugar, and soda water.
method: Pour all ingredients directly into a highball filled with ice. Stir gently. NOTE: Use ‘Old Tom' Gin for Tom Collins.
garnish: Garnish with a lemon slice and maraschino cherry.

name: Last word
description: A sharp equal-parts classic combining gin, green Chartreuse, maraschino, and lime.
method: Add all ingredients into a cocktail shaker. Shake with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Manhattan
description: A smooth whiskey and vermouth cocktail with bitters and a deep, spirit-forward profile.
method: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Garnish with a cocktail cherry.

name: Martinez
description: A richer, older martini relative with gin, sweet vermouth, maraschino, and bitters.
method: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Lemon zest.

name: Mary Pickford
description: A lightly tropical rum cocktail with pineapple, maraschino, and grenadine.
method: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Monkey Gland
description: A citrusy gin cocktail with orange notes and a subtle absinthe accent.
method: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Negroni
description: A bittersweet stirred aperitif combining gin, Campari, and sweet vermouth in equal measure.
method: Pour all ingredients directly into a chilled old fashioned glass filled with ice, Stir gently.
garnish: Garnish with a half orange slice.

name: Old Fashioned
description: A foundational whiskey cocktail built from spirit, sugar, bitters, and citrus oils.
method: Place sugar cube in old fashioned glass and saturate with bitter, add few dashes of plain water. Muddle until dissolved. Fill the glass with ice cubes and add whiskey. Stir gently.
garnish: Garnish with an orange slice or zest, and a cocktail cherry.

name: Paradise
description: A crisp, fruit-led aperitif combining gin, apricot liqueur, and orange juice.
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.

name: Planter's Punch
description: A rum-forward punch with citrus, sweetness, spice, and bitters in a full tropical style.
method: Pour all ingredients directly in a small tumbler or a typical terracotta glass. NOTE: Add dilution up to taste, it can be given by water, ice or fresh juices.
garnish: Garnish with orange zest.

name: Porto Flip
description: A rich, velvety flip of brandy, port, and egg yolk with dessert-like weight.
method: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Sprinkle with fresh ground nutmeg.

name: Ramos Fizz
description: A famously silky gin fizz with citrus, cream, orange flower water, and a long frothy texture.
method: Pour all ingredients except soda water in a cocktail shaker with ice, Shake for two minutes, double strain in a glass, pour the drink back in the shaker, and hard shake without ice for one minute. Strain into a highball glass, top up with soda. NOTE: The drink was invented by Henry Ramos in 1888, at his bar Meyer's Table d'Hôtel Internationale in New Orleans. The Ramos Fizz was originally shaken for 12 minutes by a crew of 30 bartenders who passed the shaker from one to another.

name: Rusty Nail
description: A simple scotch and Drambuie mix with warm honeyed spice.
method: Pour all ingredients directly into an old fashioned glass filled with ice. Stir gently.
garnish: Garnish with lemon zest.

name: Sazerac
description: A New Orleans whiskey cocktail with sugar, Peychaud bitters, and an absinthe rinse.
method: Rinse a chilled old-fashioned glass with the absinthe, add crushed ice and set it aside. Stir the remaining ingredients over ice in a mixing glass. Discard the ice and any excess absinthe from the prepared glass, strain the mixed drink into the glass.  NOTE: The original recipe changed after the American Civil War, Rye Whiskey substituted Cognac as it became hard to obtain.
garnish: Garnish with lemon zest.

name: Sidecar
description: A classic brandy sour with orange liqueur and lemon, dry and elegant.
method: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Stinger
description: A cool brandy and white creme de menthe digestif with a brisk mint finish.
method: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well. Strain into chilled martini cocktail glass.
garnish: Optional mint leave.

name: Tuxedo
description: A dry aromatic martini-family cocktail with maraschino, absinthe, and bitters.
method: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well. Strain into chilled martini cocktail glass.
garnish: Garnish with cherry and lemon zest

name: Vieux Carrè
description: A rich New Orleans classic mixing rye, cognac, sweet vermouth, Benedictine, and bitters.
method: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Garnish with orange zest and maraschino cherry.

name: Whiskey Sour
description: A balanced whiskey sour with citrus brightness and optional silky egg white texture.
method: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker filled with ice. Shake well. Strain into cobbler glass. If served “On the rocks”, strain ingredients into an old fashioned glass filled with ice.  NOTE: If egg white is used shake little harder to release and incorporate the foam from the egg white.
garnish: Garnish with a half orange slice and maraschino cherry, optionally use orange zest.

name: White Lady
description: A crisp gin sour with orange liqueur and lemon, bright and elegant.
method: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
